_comment: Corpus manifest for the search_guidance RAG layer. Unstructured why/how guidance ONLY (spec section 1). Sizing/plant/hardiness/perc tables are deterministic and must NOT be ingested. 'path' is relative to the repo root. 'kind' is pdf|text. 'license' notes provenance; non-gov sources carry short cited snippets only.

sources.citation_label: DC DOEE, Rain Garden How-To Manual for Homeowners
sources.license: government (Washington DC Dept. of Energy & Environment)
sources.exclude_reason: planting-design captions, plant-list tables, and credits (keep p30 special-locations prose)

sources.citation_label: Five Counties Salmonid Conservation Program, Build a Rain Garden
sources.exclude_reason: p5 sizing-factor/geometry table (deterministic-owned); p15 photo credits

sources.citation_label: Oregon Rain Garden Guide (Oregon Sea Grant / Oregon State University)
sources.exclude_reason: p3 table of contents; p28-42 plant-layout palettes and plant-list tables

sources.citation_label: EPA, Soak Up the Rain: What's the Problem

sources.license: NON-GOVERNMENT — curated to a short why/how snippet (constrained-site design alternatives). Sizing/depth prose from the source page was excluded per spec section 1 and to avoid contradicting the deterministic sizing engine. Full source paste kept at data/corpus/missouri_botanical_raw.txt (not ingested).
